caption: The video showcases a person holding up a collectible card featuring Tim Raines, a Montreal Expos outfielder and Hall of Famer. The card is part of the 2021 Topps Transcendent Collection - Hall of Fame Edition and highlights Raines' impressive Major League Baseball batting record, including his lifetime statistics such as games played, at-bats, runs, hits, and more. The setting appears to be a sports card store or a similar environment, with various boxes and cards visible in the background. In the smaller inset frames, another individual is seen handling cards and packaging, while a third frame shows a person seated, possibly discussing or reacting to the card being displayed. The overall atmosphere suggests an engaging and detailed exploration of sports memorabilia.
